# Password Generator
> Free online tool to generate strong, random passwords and passphrases.

## What it does
Generates cryptographically secure passwords using the Web Crypto API (crypto.getRandomValues). Supports both random character passwords and memorable word-based passphrases using the EFF word list.

## Features
- Customizable length (8-128 characters)
- Toggle: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols
- Exclude ambiguous characters (0, O, l, 1, I)
- Password strength meter with entropy and crack time estimate
- Passphrase mode (correct-horse-battery-staple style)
- Bulk generation (5/10/20 passwords at once)
- 100% client-side — nothing sent to any server

## Who it's for
- Anyone creating new accounts
- IT administrators generating credentials
- Security-conscious users replacing weak passwords
- Developers needing test credentials

## URL
https://passwordmake.com

## How to use
Adjust the length slider and toggle character types on/off. The password generates instantly. Click copy to save to clipboard. Switch to Passphrase mode for memorable multi-word passwords. Use Bulk mode to generate many at once.

## Pricing
Completely free. No account needed. No limits.
